name: cold-outbound-sequencer
description: Use when the user asks to "build a B2B cold-outbound sequence", "design reply-triage branching", "plan a domain warmup / sending throttle", or "make my outbound CAN-SPAM / opt-in compliant"; produces a multi-step outbound sequence with reply-triage branches (positive / objection / referral / not-now / opt-out), a warmup + send-throttle ramp schedule, jurisdiction opt-in/CAN-SPAM guardrails (guidance, not legal advice), and a SEND S-dimension read. Not for B2C lifecycle flows — use email-sequence
author: aaron-he-zhu
